velsor.trait: pixel-sort / datamosh field (from vex) x pendulum-wave bell/pluck voice, scored by just-intonation dissonance (from drolo)

wandro.trait: pendulum-row visual (wexo) x just-intonation layered voice (drolo)

welto.trait: a pendulum wave you can grab and pull taut x pentatonic scrub + slingshot pluck

vosk.trait: pixel-sort/datamosh glitch field x slow glass-flute drone

dravo.trait: pendulum-wave row (drolo) x bottom-center pluck detection (wexo)

glavo.trait: pixel-sort/datamosh visual generator (vex) x bubble-bath synth voice (tavo)

vexen.trait: struck pendulum row that decays into stillness x pentatonic pluck fading to hush

quovo.trait: orrery of orbiting motes (Kepler-speed solar system) x tavo's watery bubble-synth score

olord.trait: decaying inverted pendulums (silence does the work) x melodically-mirrored bell/pluck

wubo.trait: fading drag-trail glissando (played bubbles that hang, not rise) x continuous pitch-stepped bubble+bell voice that ducks the ambient bath

flurk.trait: boid flock (separation/alignment/cohesion swarm) x granular pentatonic grains that sonify each boid's live position

talus.trait: sandpile/avalanche cellular automaton (BakTangWiesenfeld toppling grid, one column per pitch) x cascading pluck/bell voice (each topple rings its column's note, so an avalanche IS an arpeggio)
